title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Atul Projects in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
